benefits.description: Down 40+ lbs on tirz since November; body recomp with muscle gain while losing fat tracked with body scanner
Gaining muscle while losing fat on tirz, tracked with body scanner
Amazing depth of sleep on CJC1295+ipa

side_effects.description: Initial fluid retention of approximately 5-6 lbs after starting CJC1295+ipa
Initial flushing on CJC1295+ipa, dissipates over time

protocol_notes: Started tirz in November, down 40+ lbs. Added CJC1295+ipa about a month ago. Weight has stalled within the same range for the last few weeks due to fluid retention, but clothes are getting bigger. Uncertainty about whether CJC1295+ipa is objectively helping. Tracked body composition with a body scanner.
